message:
Command `# Iter 1: 40% at 30 min, 132993 violations (same as 30% - stable section).
# DRT routing proceeding. Violations are converging.
# This will take many more iterations. Likely 10-20+ hours total.
# Set up robust long-term monitoring.

WRAPPER_RUN="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
LOG="/tmp/librelane_final.log"
LR_PID=824793

# Update background monitor
cat > /tmp/drt_monitor.sh << 'BGEOF'
#!/bin/bash
WRAPPER_RUN="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
LOG="/tmp/librelane_final.log"
LR_PID=824793
OUT="/tmp/drt_status.log"
echo "DRT monitor start $(date)" > "$OUT"
while kill -0 $LR_PID 2>/dev/null; do
  sleep 300
  T=$(date '+%H:%M:%S')
  ELAPSED=$(ps -p $LR_PID -o etime --no-headers 2>/dev/null | xargs)
  STEP=$(ls -t "$WRAPPER_RUN/" 2>/dev/null | grep "^[0-9]" | head -1)
  OR_MEM=$(ps aux | grep "openroad\b" | grep -v bash | grep -v grep | awk '{print $4}' | head -1)
  DRT=$(grep "Completing\|Start [0-9]*th\|Total wire" "$LOG" 2>/dev/null | tail -1 | xargs | head -c 80)
  FGDS=$(ls "$WRAPPER_RUN/final/gds/"*.gds 2>/dev/null | head -1)
  echo "[$T] alive($ELAPSED) step=$STEP OR=${OR_MEM}% | $DRT" >> "$OUT"
  [ -n "$FGDS" ] && echo "[$T] GDS=$FGDS" >> "$OUT"
done
echo "DRT done $(date)" >> "$OUT"
tail -30 "$LOG" >> "$OUT"
BGEOF
chmod +x /tmp/drt_monitor.sh
pkill -f "drt_monitor.sh" 2>/dev/null || true
nohup /tmp/drt_monitor.sh > /dev/null 2>&1 &
echo "DRT monitor PID=$! log=/tmp/drt_status.log"

# Long monitoring: 30-min polls, 24 hours max
for i in $(seq 1 48); do
  sleep 1800

  LR_ALIVE=$(ps -p $LR_PID -o pid --no-headers 2>/dev/null | xargs)
  ELAPSED=$(ps -p $LR_PID -o etime --no-headers 2>/dev/null | xargs)
  STEP=$(ls -t "$WRAPPER_RUN/" 2>/dev/null | grep "^[0-9]" | head -1)
  FINAL_GDS=$(ls "$WRAPPER_RUN/final/gds/"*.gds 2>/dev/null | head -1)
  DRT=$(grep "Completing\|Start [0-9]*th\|Total wire.*um\|0 DRC" "$LOG" 2>/dev/null | tail -3 | tr '\n' '|' | head -c 120)
  MONITOR=$(tail -3 /tmp/drt_status.log 2>/dev/null | tr '\n' '|')

  echo "[$(date '+%H:%M:%S')] LR=${LR_ALIVE:-DONE}(${ELAPSED}) step=$STEP"
  echo "  DRT: $DRT"
  echo "  monitor: $MONITOR"
  [ -n "$FINAL_GDS" ] && echo "  *** GDS: $FINAL_GDS ***"
  echo ""

  if [ -z "$LR_ALIVE" ]; then
    echo "=== LR DONE ==="
    ls -lt "$WRAPPER_RUN/" | head -40
    find "$WRAPPER_RUN/final/" 2>/dev/null | sort | head -20
    tail -60 "$LOG"
    break
  fi
done` executed with exit code -1.

{"command": "# Iter 1: 40% at 30 min, 132993 violations (same as 30% - stable section).
# DRT routing proceeding. Violations are converging.
# This will take many more iterations. Likely 10-20+ hours total.

LOG="/tmp/librelane_final.log"

# Update background monitor
cat > /tmp/drt_monitor.sh << 'BGEOF'

  DRT=$(grep "Completing\|Start [0-9]*th\|Total wire" "$LOG" 2>/dev/null | tail -1 | xargs | head -c 80)
  FGDS=$(ls "$WRAPPER_RUN/final/gds/"*.gds 2>/dev/null | head -1)

  [ -n "$FGDS" ] && echo "[$T] GDS=$FGDS" >> "$OUT"
done
echo "DRT done $(date)" >> "$OUT"
tail -30 "$LOG" >> "$OUT"
BGEOF
chmod +x /tmp/drt_monitor.sh
pkill -f "drt_monitor.sh" 2>/dev/null || true
nohup /tmp/drt_monitor.sh > /dev/null 2>&1 &
echo "DRT monitor PID=$! log=/tmp/drt_status.log"

# Long monitoring: 30-min polls, 24 hours max
for i in $(seq 1 48); do
  sleep 1800

  LR_ALIVE=$(ps -p $LR_PID -o pid --no-headers 2>/dev/null | xargs)
  ELAPSED=$(ps -p $LR_PID -o etime --no-headers 2>/dev/null | xargs)
  STEP=$(ls -t "$WRAPPER_RUN/" 2>/dev/null | grep "^[0-9]" | head -1)
  FINAL_GDS=$(ls "$WRAPPER_RUN/final/gds/"*.gds 2>/dev/null | head -1)
  DRT=$(grep "Completing\|Start [0-9]*th\|Total wire.*um\|0 DRC" "$LOG" 2>/dev/null | tail -3 | tr '\n' '|' | head -c 120)
  MONITOR=$(tail -3 /tmp/drt_status.log 2>/dev/null | tr '\n' '|')

  echo "[$(date '+%H:%M:%S')] LR=${LR_ALIVE:-DONE}(${ELAPSED}) step=$STEP"
  echo "  DRT: $DRT"
  echo "  monitor: $MONITOR"
  [ -n "$FINAL_GDS" ] && echo "  *** GDS: $FINAL_GDS ***"
  echo ""

  if [ -z "$LR_ALIVE" ]; then
    echo "=== LR DONE ==="
    ls -lt "$WRAPPER_RUN/" | head -40
    find "$WRAPPER_RUN/final/" 2>/dev/null | sort | head -20
    tail -60 "$LOG"
    break
  fi
done", "timeout": 86400}
function.name: execute_bash

content: Command exited with code -1 and error:
